title: 35 Pcs Bottle Opener Keyring, Aluminum Claw Bar Keyring Bottle Openers Pocket Beer Bottle Openers with Keychain Soda Beverage Beer Bottle Opener, 7 Colours
features: This Beer Bottle Opener is ideal to be tucked away or out on your keyring or keychains. So its always at hand when you need to open that bottle. 7 different coloured key ring bottle openers, there are enough for your daily use.

Use "claws" of the Claw Bar Keyring Bottle Opener for bottles and other hook for cans Made of strong aluminum durable and practical. These keyring bottle openers are packaged in a plastic box, beautiful appearance, the strong storage box made from impact resistant polypropylene that is fully recyclable.

This Keychain Classic Mini Bottle Opener is easy to carry and use and easy to fit in pocket. Perfect for home, office, party, restaurants, wine bars, convenience stores, hiking, camping, and traveling, etc.
Put the Pocket Beer Bottle Openers with Keychain on your keys with the key chain ring Not only as a bottle opener but also as a cool decoration. And this is a great party gift!
Also comes with the ring so the Keys Collector EDC Pocket Keyring can be attached to your keychain if need. Small and very light features a great style so it looks good wherever you are!
description: Product description: Name: Keychain Classic Mini Bottle Opener / Keys Collector EDC Pocket Keyring. Varied colours of the Keychain Classic Mini bottle opener meet your different needs. Bottle opener with keychain easy to carry and also collect your keys well. Funny design get several colors once they not only the bottle openers can also to be keychains to hang some tiny stuff. Bottle openers are very suitable to be used in a party wedding or outdoor trip. Nice choice to be a gift as well. Specifications: Material: Aluminum Size: 65mm * 14mm Color: Red, Yellow, Blue, Black, Green, Purple, Silver Package included: 35 * Bottle openers:
